'''Ulkop Securities''' was a company that specialized in the production of voice scramblers that aided a person to disguise their voice. During the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], they produced the [[SVC-700 Voice Scrambler]].

{{Company-stub}}
